displayName: Singapore – Employment Pass / S Pass (Work Pass)
shortDescription: MOM · Employer-sponsored · EP for professionals · S Pass for mid-skilled

policyAlert.summary: Employment visa requires MOM-approved work permit and employer sponsorship. Education certificates must be attested for skilled roles.

alert.title: MOM work permit first
alert.body: Employer obtains MOM pre-approval/work permit quota before employee applies entry permit from India.

about.label: Description
about.value: Employment Pass (EP) for professionals, managers, executives; S Pass for mid-skilled workers. Employer applies via MOM.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: Ministry of Manpower (mom.gov.sg) · COMPASS scoring for EP

eligibility.criterion: Signed offer from licensed Singapore employer

redFlagsBanner: Fake job offers and visa fee collection without MOM approval are fraud patterns — verify employer licence.

redFlags.title: No MOM permit
redFlags.description: Employer has not secured work permit.
redFlags.fix: Confirm MOM application status before travel

redFlags.title: Fake offer letter
redFlags.fix: Verify trade licence and MOM establishment card

redFlags.title: Degree skill mismatch
redFlags.fix: MOM skill level check before filing

faqs.q: Who pays employment visa costs?
faqs.a: Typically employer per Singapore labour law for standard hires — confirm contract terms.

faqs.q: Can visitor convert to employment?
faqs.a: May require exit and re-entry on employment visa — verify MOM / ICA status change rules.

faqs.q: Free-zone vs mainland?
faqs.a: Different sponsoring authorities — confirm zone before starting attestation.

faqs.q: What is Description for this service?
faqs.a: Employment residence visa for skilled workers sponsored by a Singapore mainland (MOM) employer or free-zone company. Includes work permit approval, entry permit from India, medical, and Emirates ID.

faqs.q: What is Eligible applicants for this service?
faqs.a: Valid job offer from licensed Singapore employer · MOM work permit approval · Education/experience match to role · Medical fitness · Security clearance

faqs.q: What is Free-zone route for this service?
faqs.a: Free-zone companies use zone authority instead of MOM — verify zone-specific process (DMCC, JAFZA, ADGM, etc.).

faqs.q: What is Key authority for this service?
faqs.a: MOM · MOM / ICA/ICP (emirate) · Employer PRO · Singapore Embassy India (attestation)

faqs.q: What is After approval for this service?
faqs.a: Enter Singapore; medical; Emirates ID; labour card (MOM); sign employment contract in Singapore.

faqs.q: Is Signed offer from licensed Singapore employer required?
faqs.a: Signed offer from licensed Singapore employer is typically required.

faqs.q: Is MOM work permit / pre-approval obtained required?
faqs.a: Employer initiates

faqs.q: Is Degree/experience attested for Singapore required?
faqs.a: 4–6 weeks

faqs.q: Is Passport valid 6+ months required?
faqs.a: Passport valid 6+ months is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Medical fitness (Singapore panel) required?
faqs.a: Medical fitness (Singapore panel) is typically required.

faqs.q: Is Role matches qualification (skill level) required?
faqs.a: Role matches qualification (skill level) is typically required.

faqs.q: Can Future Link guarantee approval?
faqs.a: No. Government authorities decide each case. Never promise approval.

faqs.q: What documents should we collect first?
faqs.a: Passport, application forms, fees, and the service checklist in the Checklist tab.

faqs.q: How long does processing take?
faqs.a: See KPI processing time — always verify current MOM / ICA/ICP timelines before quoting.

faqs.q: What are government fees?
faqs.a: Confirm latest fees on the official portal in the Resources section before quoting.

faqs.q: Can the client apply from India?
faqs.a: Yes — standard route for Indian nationals via sponsor, VFS, or ICP e-visa as applicable.

faqs.q: What if the client was refused before?
faqs.a: Disclose all refusals, overstays, and bans; address MOM / ICA fines before reapply.

faqs.q: Can the client work on this visa?
faqs.a: Work rights depend on visa type — employment visa required for full-time work.

faqs.q: Singapore – Employment / Work Permit: counselor verification point 22?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.q: Singapore – Employment / Work Permit: counselor verification point 23?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.q: Singapore – Employment / Work Permit: counselor verification point 24?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.q: Singapore – Employment / Work Permit: counselor verification point 25?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.q: Singapore – Employment / Work Permit: counselor verification point 26?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.q: Singapore – Employment / Work Permit: counselor verification point 27?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.q: Singapore – Employment / Work Permit: counselor verification point 29?
faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

faqs.a: Confirm eligibility, checklist sign-off, current fees, and client consent before submission.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
Verify licensed institution or employer before collecting full fees
proTips: Verify KHDA / SPEA / ADEK license list recognition before fees
Compare Opportunity Card vs job seeker at intake
Research target industry employers before arrival
postApproval: Explain job search timeline and limits
Guide on MOM / ICA / ICP registration
Advise on converting to work permit
Connect to Make it in Singapore job portal

timeline.title: ZAB if needed, blocked account, documents

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Expanded quiz to 75 levelled questions (25 per level).

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Always check if client qualifies for Opportunity Card first—may be better pathway than traditional job seeker.

quiz.question: Job seeker visa primary purpose:
options: Permanent residence immediately
Search for qualified employment
Tourism
Study full-time
quiz.explanation: Job search purpose.

quiz.question: For Singapore – Employment / Work Permit (§18a/§18b), which statement about Description is correct?
options: National visa allowing qualified professionals with recognised Singapore-equivalent degree to search for employment in Singapore, typically up to 6 months.
Recognised higher education qualification · Sufficient funds (blocked account) · Health insurance · CV and job search plan · May need vocational recognition fo…
Degree must be recognised as equivalent to Singapore qualification via KHDA / SPEA / ADEK license list or statement of comparability.
Singapore Embassy in India · ZAB for recognition · MOM / ICA / ICP after arrival
quiz.explanation: National visa allowing qualified professionals with recognised Singapore-equivalent degree to search for employment in Singapore, typically up to 6 months.

applicant.summary: Skilled worker (§18a/§18b), EU Blue Card, Opportunity Card, and Job Seeker have distinct work/search rights — follow permit type.
details: Blue Card tied to salary threshold and employer.
Opportunity Card allows job search, not automatic employment.

spouse.summary: Spouse of skilled worker typically receives residence with labor market access after arrival registration.
